description: BREATHE is our addictive nature fragrance. It’s breathtaking landscapes as far as the eye can see, a world of silence, where nature is the only language. It’s the feeling of being part of something greater, and being transported elsewhere. It’s the beauty of green living. Breathe is the perfect encapsulation of nature’s power; escape, serenity, splendor and simplicity. Breathe is a fragrance that feels like a breath of fresh air, a return to the natural world.
accord_text: aquatic, lavender, musky, citrus, fresh spicy, fresh, aromatic, powdery

description: CRUSH is our fragrance inspired by the addiction to rose macarons. The crunchy shell of these sweet treats hides a melting heart, ready to intoxicate the taste buds with their subtle flavours. Rose macarons are an explosion of textures and aromas just waiting to resonate, a symphony of sweetness ready to pour out. CRUSH is our delicious reimagining of rose macarons, a fragrance that allows you to forget about time and invites you to daydream. CRUSH is a perfume that offers a moment of pure delicacy.
accord_text: rose, sweet, fruity, almond, nutty, vanilla, floral, tropical, lactonic, fresh

description: Send a unique AKRO gift. The new virtual gift card will be immediately emailed to the recipient’s or to yourself, to print or forward later. *Valid for 12 months from issue date. For use on akrofragrances.com in the same currency as when purchased. The gift card is automatically sent once payment has been processed. The gift card cannot be returned.

GLOW is our addictive party fragrance. One of the reasons we go to parties is the chance to be noticed, admired, or possibly seduced. At their best, parties allow us to become movie stars for the night, bringing people into our orbit and watching them gaze adoringly at us. To attract people, you need to dress beautifully and style your hair perfectly, but the truth is, nothing pulls others towards you like the power of scent. Glow is a fragrance formed by our love for parties and nights out. It’s a warm, sensual perfume that will make you the star of any room. A quick spray on your skin and you’ll be brimming with confidence, ready to own the night, ready to Glow.
accord_text: amber, vanilla, soft spicy, smoky, powdery, balsamic, sweet

description: SMILE is our addictive happiness fragrance. SMILE is a new fragrance inspired by the pursuit of joy and born out of a unique family connection. Many years ago, as a young girl, Akro founder Anaïs Cresp asked her father, the master perfumer Olivier Cresp, to create a perfume just for her, one that nobody else in the world would have. Olivier set about creating a scent that was as powerful as it was personal—a bottle full of joy for his daughter to carry through life. To do this, he combined notes of sage, bergamot, and raspberry, building a bright and vivid fragrance that could work at any time and any place. For years, Anaïs kept this scent to herself, but now she wants to share it with the world. SMILE is a fragrance to brighten your day.
accord_text: citrus, fruity, aromatic, sweet, musky, fresh spicy, powdery, soft spicy
